review:
As a yelper I'm embarrassed that I didn't take any pictures of the food this week.  The chips and salsa and guacamole were awesome. Between the four of us we had a carnitas burrito, carmelo with carne asada and all but one of the taco meats.  The food was so good and we were so hungry that we didn't think of taking pictures.  So if you're thinking of trying it's definitely a thumbs up from us.

Second visit I actually took pictures! The queso fundido chorizo was my absolute favorite! Don't pass this place up!
